assertions.title: Organisation creation during onboarding

steps.action: Register and verify round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a@example.test, then sign in to /onboarding
steps.expected: Verified user reaches the real onboarding flow
steps.observed: The verification link from the shared dev-server log redirected to /login?message=email_verified&callbackUrl=%2Fonboarding, and sign-in loaded /onboarding.

steps.action: Complete onboarding with the Children's Residential Homes domain and skip invites
steps.expected: The organisation is created and the user is redirected into the new org dashboard
steps.observed: POST /onboarding returned 200 and the browser loaded /round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcd/dashboard?welcome=true.

steps.expected: The creator is assigned the owner role
steps.observed: The team page listed Round2 Tenant A (round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a@example.test) with the role Owner.

assertions.reason: The A-account completed the real onboarding flow successfully, landed on its org-scoped dashboard, and the resulting team page confirmed the creator was assigned Owner.
evidence: foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/verify-a-success.png (verification success banner on the login page for account A)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/onboarding-a-step2-children-selected.png (Children's Residential Homes selected during onboarding)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/onboarding-a-complete-result.png (org-scoped dashboard after onboarding completion)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-a-team-owner.png (team page showing Round2 Tenant A and the Owner role)

Shared dev-server log: POST /api/auth/register -> 201 for round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a@example.test; POST /api/auth/login -> 200; POST /onboarding -> 200; GET /round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcd/dashboard?welcome=true -> 200.
Console errors: none observed in agent-browser during registration, onboarding, or owner-role verification.

assertions.title: Organisation name validation

steps.action: Click Continue on step 1 with an empty organisation name
steps.expected: The wizard blocks progress and shows validation messages
steps.observed: The page displayed 'Organisation name is required' and 'Slug is required' and stayed on step 1.

steps.action: Paste an over-limit organisation name (132 characters)
steps.expected: The wizard rejects the value with a maximum-length validation message
steps.observed: The field silently truncated the value to 100 characters, auto-generated a slug, and allowed the wizard to continue to step 2 with no max-length error message.

assertions.reason: The empty-name branch validates correctly, but the over-limit branch does not. Instead of rejecting the value with a maximum-length message, the UI truncates it to 100 characters and proceeds.
evidence: foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/VAL-TENANT-002-empty-name-validation.png (step 1 shows 'Organisation name is required' and 'Slug is required')
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/VAL-TENANT-002-max-length-behavior.png (the wizard advanced to step 2 after pasting an over-limit name)
Captured field value after paste: 'round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcdefghijklmn' (100 characters).
Console errors: none observed during the validation checks.

assertions.title: Care domain selection persists

steps.action: Create org A by selecting Children's Residential Homes during onboarding
steps.expected: The selected domain persists in organisation settings
steps.observed: The settings page at /round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcd/settings loaded successfully and showed only the Children's Residential checkbox selected.

steps.action: Inspect org A dashboard and persons page after onboarding
steps.expected: Domain-specific terminology and children's-residential tooling are applied throughout the UI
steps.observed: The dashboard showed generic cards and navigation only, with no visible Ofsted / Reg 44 / Reg 45 / LAC / PEP / young person text; the persons page still used generic 'People' and 'people in care' wording.

assertions.reason: The Children's Residential selection does persist into organisation settings, but the rest of the UI does not adapt. The dashboard and persons page stayed generic and did not expose the expected children's-residential terminology or Ofsted-specific surfaces.
evidence: foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-a-settings-root-direct.png (org A settings page with only Children's Residential checked)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-a-dashboard-clean.png (org A dashboard remained generic after onboarding)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-a-persons-generic.png (org A persons page still says 'People' / 'people in care')

Captured settings state for org A: Domiciliary=false, Supported Living=false, Children's Residential=true; name='round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcdefghijklmn'; slug='round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcd'.
Dashboard text inspection for org A found Ofsted=false, Reg 44=false, Reg 45=false, missing from care=false, LAC=false, PEP=false, young person=false.
Console errors: none observed while checking org A settings, dashboard, and persons page.

assertions.title: Multiple care domain selection

steps.action: Create org B by selecting Domiciliary Care and Supported Living during onboarding
steps.expected: Both selected domains persist in settings and enable relevant dual-domain tooling
steps.observed: The settings page at /round2-tenantonboard-20260401-b-domiciliary-supported-living/settings showed both Domiciliary Care and Supported Living checked, with Children's Residential unchecked.

steps.action: Inspect the org B dashboard after onboarding
steps.expected: The dashboard exposes CQC / domiciliary and supported-living specific tools for the selected domains
steps.observed: The dashboard stayed generic and did not show CQC, visit scheduling, EVV, travel time, client visit summaries, PBS, or outcomes-tracking surfaces.

assertions.reason: The multi-select state persists correctly in settings, but the expected combined domain tooling does not appear on the live dashboard. Org B remained a generic shell instead of exposing both domiciliary-care and supported-living surfaces.
evidence: foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/onboarding-b-step2-multi-selected.png (Domiciliary Care and Supported Living selected together during onboarding)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-b-settings-root.png (org B settings page with Domiciliary Care and Supported Living checked)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-b-dashboard.png (org B dashboard remained generic after onboarding)

Captured settings state for org B: Domiciliary=true, Supported Living=true, Children's Residential=false; name='round2-tenantonboard-20260401-b domiciliary supported living'; slug='round2-tenantonboard-20260401-b-domiciliary-supported-living'.
Dashboard text inspection for org B found CQC=false, visit scheduling=false, EVV=false, travel time=false, client visit summaries=false, PBS=false, outcomes=false.
Console errors: none observed while checking org B settings and dashboard.

assertions.title: Domain adaptation

steps.action: Compare the completed dashboard for org A (Children's Residential) with the completed dashboard for org B (Domiciliary Care + Supported Living)
steps.expected: Org A shows Ofsted-specific tools and terminology, while org B shows CQC/domiciliary-specific tools and terminology
steps.observed: Both dashboards showed the same generic starter shell and generic cards (People, Staff, Settings) instead of domain-adapted surfaces.

steps.action: Check for the assertion's required dashboard terms
steps.expected: Org A exposes Reg 44/45, missing-from-care, LAC, and PEP items; org B exposes visit scheduling, EVV, travel time, and client visit summaries
steps.observed: None of those required terms appeared on the respective dashboards.

assertions.reason: This rerun is no longer blocked by onboarding failure, but the completed dashboards still do not adapt by domain. The children's-residential dashboard lacked the required Ofsted-specific tools, and the domiciliary/supported-living dashboard lacked the required CQC-specific tools.
evidence: foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-a-dashboard-clean.png (completed dashboard for the children's-residential org A)
foundation/round2-tenant-onboarding/org-b-dashboard.png (completed dashboard for the domiciliary/supported-living org B)
Org A dashboard text inspection: Ofsted=false, Reg 44=false, Reg 45=false, missing from care=false, LAC=false, PEP=false, young person=false.
Org B dashboard text inspection: CQC=false, visit scheduling=false, EVV=false, travel time=false, client visit summaries=false, PBS=false, outcomes=false.

Shared dev-server log: GET /round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcd/dashboard -> 200 and GET /round2-tenantonboard-20260401-b-domiciliary-supported-living/dashboard -> 200 after successful POST /onboarding submissions.
Console errors: none observed while comparing the completed dashboards.

frictions.description: The dashboard sidebar Organisation link targeted /settings/organisation, which returned a 404 for org A even though the actual organisation settings form was available at /settings.
frictions.resolution: Used the app's working /settings route directly to verify persisted domain selections and organisation details.

frictions.description: Opening verify-email links in agent-browser triggered a transient 'Execution context was destroyed' tool error during the redirect chain.
frictions.resolution: Waited for the final redirected page and then captured the resulting login-page success state; both verification flows completed successfully.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-TENANT-001) and 4 failed (VAL-TENANT-002, VAL-TENANT-003, VAL-TENANT-004, VAL-CROSS-011).
notes: Namespace-scoped organisations exercised: org A persisted as name 'round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcdefghijklmn' with slug 'round2-tenantonboard-20260401-a-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-abcd'; org B persisted as name 'round2-tenantonboard-20260401-b domiciliary supported living' with slug 'round2-tenantonboard-20260401-b-domiciliary-supported-living'.

Concrete rerun outcome: onboarding is now working end-to-end for both isolated accounts, owner assignment is visible in team settings, domain selections persist in settings, but max-length validation and domain-adapted surfaces still fail.
